title: [Docs] Add tools page to the website and circt-verilog docs
body:
Proposal to update the website documentation adding a specific tools page, where we can list all the following tools:

- circt-verilog
- circt-synth
- circt-lec
- circt-bmc
- arcillator
- etc

Some of these already have documentation elsewhere (e.g. verification projects) but seems sensible to bring them all together? Apologies if I've missed documentation hiding elsewhere?
